markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, strategy, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Resumes:** The 1-article/day cadence resumes Jan 9; automated publishing is in progress to streamline the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Competitor Content Unblocked:** Everest will share internal assets on Volta to unblock comparison articles. A new ChatGPT-driven research process will accelerate future content.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** Meetings move to bi-weekly for strategic focus. A Q4 retrospective is due Jan 31 to inform the 2026 content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**New Content Formats:** Ambient will explore programmatic SEO (e.g., a glossary) and curated content hubs, inspired by ZeroEyes, to diversify traffic sources.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Publishing

  - [**Publishing Cadence:** Resumes Jan 9 at 1 article/day.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [**Rationale:** 12 articles updated based on Everest's feedback are now ready.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Automated Publishing:** In progress using the provided API key.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Enables Mariana to publish directly, streamlining the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Template Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [Adding FAQ and schema to the article template to improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [A GrowthX director is reviewing the template for performance-boosting elements (e.g., sticky CTAs).](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [**Article Image Pipeline:** Updated for better visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [**Changes:** Lighter filter → makes image more visible; key phrase → replaces article title on image.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX will provide 2-3 options in drafts for initial feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Everest prefers speed over perfection; GrowthX will proceed without feedback to avoid delays.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)

### Competitor Comparison Articles

  - [**Volta Comparison:** Unblocked.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Action:** Everest will share internal assets (reconnaissance assignment) on Volta's positioning, products, and pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**New Research Process:** A standardized process will be used for all comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Method:** Use ChatGPT for foundational research on competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Accelerates content creation, especially for competitors without existing battle cards.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Comparison content must highlight Ambient's specific advantages, focusing on key capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Content Strategy & Planning

  - [**New Content Formats:** Ambient will explore formats beyond the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [**Inspiration:** ZeroEyes' curated content hub (a mix of editorial, stats, and gated research).](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Idea:** A dynamic, physical security glossary to drive programmatic SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**2026 Planning:** A dedicated session will align content strategy with Ambient's 2026 goals.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Timing:** Early February, after Ambient's internal goal-setting.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Context:** The Q4 retrospective (due Jan 31) will provide a foundation for this discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Operations & Process

  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Shifting to bi-weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To focus live meetings on strategy and performance insights, not project management.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Support:** Daily async check-ins (Mon/Fri) and ad hoc meetings will continue as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [**Article Topic Approvals:** The approval process will be improved.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [**Issue:** The current approval view only shows titles, lacking context.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [**Fix:** GrowthX will add keywords and article overviews to all proposals.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**AI-Generated Dashes:** Mau requested removing the stereotypical AI-generated dashes.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will update writing guidelines to use commas instead.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Everest:**](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [Share internal Volta assets to unblock comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [Add keywords and overviews to all article topic proposals.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines to remove AI-generated dashes.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [Deliver the Q4 retrospective report by Jan 31.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Schedule the 2026 strategy session for early February.](https://fathom.video/share/7eHuBYTfCxcZcsvc8VpfP_mWEVCCro7o?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
